strengths: Exceeds 6+ year requirement with 14+ years of full-stack development; demonstrates deep expertise in TypeScript and Node.js across multiple senior roles
Current role at re:cinq shows active involvement in AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly addressing the required 'Experience with AI agent development' skill
Consistently demonstrates strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, system architecture) and has built high-performance, scalable systems handling millions of requests
concerns: Resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement; while strong in Node.js ecosystem, framework-specific experience is unclear
No confirmation of testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) despite demonstrated commitment to testing practices across roles
React experience not mentioned; resume shows preference for Ember.js and other frontend frameworks, raising questions about primary UI stack alignment
response.justification: James is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 14+ years of development and confirmed expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and system architecture that directly exceed the 6+ year requirement. His current role demonstrates active work on AI agent infrastructure, matching a required skill. However, the resume lacks explicit mention of three primary stack components: Nest.js, React, and Vitest, making actual stack familiarity uncertain. His strong foundational skills and demonstrated ability to adopt new technologies suggest capability to quickly learn the specific frameworks, but this gap represents a material unknown for this role.
